slides.title: Imibono Ngeluhlanga (Race) Ekupheleni Kwelikhulu-19 Nelikhulu-20 Leminyaka
slides.lead: Kutsi emaYurophu asungula njani sayensi yemanga 'yeluhlanga', nekutsi leyo mibono yaphendvulwa njani yaba yimitsetfo, bumbuso lobukhulu (empires) kanye nekugcina, kubulawa kwesive sonkhe (genocide).

media.alt: Lisethi lemathulusi ekulinganisa (callipers) etulu kwesitfombe semuntfu, limelela sayensi yemanga yekulinganisa luhlanga.

slides.notes: Cala ngekwenta umbono lomkhulu wesihloko sonkhe ucace: 'luhlanga' akusilo liciniso lebayoloji kepha ngumbono wemphakatsi nowetepolitiki lowakhiwa bantfu, ikakhulukati kuze bafakazele emandla nekungalingani. Bonisa umgca lochubekako wesifundvo - kuhlukanisa ngemacembu, bese sayensi yemanga (Social Darwinism, eugenics), bese inchubomgomo nebudlova (kubulawa kwetive ngemakoloni, iNazi Germany, kanye netekuhlangana neNingizimu Afrika). Beka umbuzo wesigaba se-FET wekuhlaziya: imibono iba njani yimiphumela?

slides.title: Sisho kutsini nge'luhlanga' (race)?
slides.lead: Sayensi yanamuhla iyavuma kutsi kute sisekelo sebayoloji sekwehlukanisa bantfu babe 'tinhlanga' letehlukene.

blocks.text: **Luhlanga (Race)** yindlela yekuhlela bantfu ngekwetimphawu temtimba njengalubala lwesikhumba. Kubukeka kwemvelo, kepha kuyintfo **leyakhiwa ngumphakatsi (social construct)** - umbono lowasungulwa yimiphakatsi, hhayi liciniso lelitfolwa kubayoloji. Bantfu babelana ngetulu kwema-99.9% e-DNA yabo, futsi kukhona kwehluka lokwengcile kwetakhamuti *ngekhatsi* nakuliphi licembu lelibitwa ngekutsi lelohlanga kunaloku *emkhatsini* wemacembu.

items: **Bandlululo ngeluhlanga (Racism)** kukholelwa kutsi lamacembu angahlelwa ngamazinga, lamanye 'aphakeme' kunalamanye.
Ngeminyaka yema-1800, emaYurophu ayembesa leyo nkholelo ngelulwimi lwesayensi.
Lobu bandlululo 'besayensi' base busetjentiswa kufakazela bugcili, bumbuso lobukhulu kanye, ngemuva kwaloko, kubulawa kwebantfu labanyenti.

slides.notes: Yehlukanisa ngalokucacile emkhatsini wemagama lamatsatfu labafundzi lokungafanele bawadidanise: luhlanga (sigaba), bandlululo (luhlelo lwenkholelo lwekuhlela ngemazinga), kanye nebandlululo besayensi/besayensi yemanga (umzamo wekufakazela loko kuhlela ngesayensi). Gcizelela kutsi kubita luhlanga ngekutsi 'yintfo leyakhiwa ngumphakatsi' akusho kutsi bandlululo bungumcabango nje - imiphumela yabo yiyona ngempela ngendlela lesihlukumezako. Beka sizatfu sekutsi kungani sayensi beyihehako emacenjini lanemandla: yenta kungalingani kubukeke kungtemvelo kunekukhetsa.

slides.title: Kuhlukanisa bantfu ngemacembu
slides.lead: Bososayensi bemvelo baseYurophu bacala kuhlela bantfu babe tinhlobo letimile - futsi babahlela ngemazinga ngasese.

blocks.text: Ngesikhatsi se-Enlightenment, bososayensi bazama kuhlukanisa tonkhe tintfo letiphilako. **Carl Linnaeus** (1735) na-**Johann Blumenbach** (1795) bahlukanisa bantfu babe 'tinhlobonhlobo' letimbalwa ngekusekelwe kulubala lwesikhumba nekuma kwelugebhezi lwelikhanda. Blumenbach wasungula ligama lelitsi *Caucasian* futsi, lokubalulekile, wabeka emaYurophu etulu ehlelweni lakhe.

items: Kuhlukanisa kwakubukeka kungakhetsi, kepha kwakha **luhlelo lwemazinga (hierarchy)** ngemaYurophu njengesibonelo lesihle.
Leti tigaba tabunjwa yinkhatsi yebugcili nebumbuso lobukhulu lobubukhulako.
Bacabangi labalandzelako baphatsa leti tinhlobo letasungulwa kungatsi tatimile futsi tingtemvelo.

media.alt: Emabhokisi lamane lanetibhalo lahlelwe njengephiramidi lehleliwe, amelela tigaba teluhlanga letasungulwa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='84' y='24' width='52' height='26' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='64' y='58' width='92' height='26' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='44' y='92' width='132' height='26' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' y='126' width='172' height='26' fill='#b7a98d'/><line x1='110' y1='18' x2='110' y2='152' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenta lesento lesifihlakele sibonakale: kuhlukanisa (kuhlela) kwashelela kwaba luhlelo lwemazinga (kuhlela ngemazinga) ngaphandle kwabuphi bufakazi bekuhlela ngemazinga. Blumenbach ngekwakhe bekangenalo kakhulu luhlelo lwemazinga kwendlula labo labamsebentisa, kepha balandzeli bakhe bacinisa tigaba takhe - lesi sibonelo lesihle sekutsi sayensi ingagotjwa njani kuze isebentele lubandlululo. [SME] Cinisekisa emalanga/imininingwane lengiyo (Linnaeus 1735 Systema Naturae; Blumenbach 1795 edition) ngekumelene ne-athikili ye-SAHO ngaphambi kwekukhicita.

slides.title: Bandlululo ngeluhlanga besayensi
slides.lead: Kulinganisa tingebhezi temakhanda nemitimba kute 'kufakazelwe' kuhlela ngemazinga lobekuvele kuncunyiwe ngaphambili.

blocks.text: Ngeminyaka yema-1800, labo lababandlululako basebentisa emathulusi lanjenge-**craniometry** (kulinganisa bukhulu belugebhezi lwelikhanda) ne-**phrenology** (kufundza emavukuvuku ekhanda) kuze bacaphune kutsi lamanye emacembu ahlakaniphe kwendlula lamanye. Sibita loku ngekutsi **bandlululo ngeluhlanga besayensi yemanga (pseudo-scientific racism)** ngobe basebentisa *sifanekiso* sesayensi kepha bangayinaki indlela lefanele - baphenyi bebafuna bufakazi bekucinisekisa loko labebavele bakukholelwa.

items: Idatha yakhetfwa, yafundvwa ngalokungasilo nobe yasungulwa kuze isekele bukhulu bemaYurophu.
Simphetfo (luhlelo lwemazinga eluhlanga) sasatjatfwa ngaphambi kwekutsi 'lucwaningo' lucale.
Kwanika bugcili, kunconywa kwemakoloni kanye nekwehlukaniswa (segregation) sizatfu lesihloniphekile, 'sesayensi'.

media.alt: Lugebhezi lwelikhanda eceleni kwemathulusi ekulinganisa nerula.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 46 q40 -20 66 8 q20 22 6 50 q-6 12 -22 12 h-8 v14 h-14 v-14 h-10 q-20 0 -26 -22 q-8 -30 8 -48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='84' cy='78' r='8' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='110' cy='80' r='7' fill='#5c1414'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='188' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='188' y2='30' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela inkinga yendlela, ngobe iyinhlitiyo yalomcondvo: sayensi yemanga iguculela emuva inchubo yesayensi ngekucala ngemphendvulo bese ifuna kusekelwa. I-craniometry (ngekwesibonelo lucomelo lwetingebhezi telugebhezi lwebaphenyi labanjenge-Samuel Morton) yatsi ngemuva yakhonjiswa kutsi igcwele kukhetsa nemaphutsa. Xhumanisa nelikhono le-FET lekuhlola kutsembeka kwemitfombo - laba bekungtchwepheshe' labagunya labo lasetjentiswa kabi.

slides.title: Social Darwinism
slides.lead: Kugucula intiyori lemayelana nemvelo ibe sizatfu selunya lwebantfu.

blocks.text: Incwadzi yaCharles Darwin letsi *On the Origin of Species* (1859) yachaza kutsi tinhlobo tetilwane netitjalo tishintja njani ngekukhetsa kwemvelo (natural selection). Labanye - ikakhulukati **Herbert Spencer**, lowasungula umusho lotsi *survival of the fittest* (kusinda kwalophile kakhulu) - basebentisa loku ngalokungakalungi emiphakatsini yebantfu. **Social Darwinism** yatsi tive letinjingile, tigaba kanye 'netinhlanga' tatibusa ngobe tatiphakeme ngemvelo.

items: Yaveta kungalingani nebuphuya kungtemvelo futsi kudzingekile.
Yafakazela bukoloni (imperialism): kuncoba kwabekwa njengekutsi 'labanemandla' bancoba 'lababutsakatsaka'.
Ibayoloji yaDarwin yagucwa; yena akazange atsi labanye bantfu kufanele babuse labanye.

media.alt: Sitebhisi setibha letenyukako lelinemcibisholo, sibonisa likhwelo lemanga lenchubekelaphambili.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='116' width='36' height='28' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='36' height='48' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='108' y='72' width='36' height='72' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='150' y='44' width='36' height='100' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M30 108 L180 36' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M180 36 L168 40 M180 36 L176 50' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yiba ngconempela kubafundzi be-FET: Social Darwinism kusetjentiswa kabi kwaDarwin, hhayi umbono waDarwin ngekwakhe (lugibe lolujwayelekile lwetivivinyo). Spencer, hhayi Darwin, wasungula 'survival of the fittest'. Umsebenti lomkhulu walombono bekungewe'nkholo yetepolitiki - wenta kwakhiwa kwembuso lomkhulu wemaYurophu nekungalingani lokumatima kwetomnotfo kubukeke njengemitsetfo yemvelo lekute umuntfu langayimelana nayo nobe lokufanele ayimelane.

slides.title: Eugenics
slides.lead: Uma umphakatsi ungakhulisa titjalo netifuyo letingcono, labanye bachaza, kungani ungakhuliseki bantfu 'labangcono'?

blocks.text: **Eugenics** (livela esiGriki lelisho 'lotelwe kahle') laniketwa ligama ngu-**Francis Galton**, umzala waDarwin, nga-1883. Bekuhloswe 'kutfutfukisa' inani lebantfu ngekukhutsata 'labafanele' kutsi babe nebantfwana (*positive* eugenics) nekumisa 'labangakafaneli' kutsi bente njalo (*negative* eugenics) - ngekwehlukanisa, kuvimbela imishado nekutsenwa ngenkani (forced sterilisation).

items: 'Labangakafaneli' bekuchazwa kutsi bafaka labaphuyile, labakhubatekile, labanekugula kwengcondvo kanye nebantfu labangesibo bebandla lelimhlophe.
Kwaphendvula bandlululo besayensi yemanga kwaba **luhlelo lwesento sahulumende**.
Ngasekucaleni kwema-1900, i-eugenics beyivamile futsi ihlonishwa eYurophu nase-USA.

media.alt: Sihlahla semndeni lesentiwe, letinye tingatja timakiwe tanqamulwa, simelela kukhetselwa kwekutalana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='110' y1='140' x2='110' y2='70' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='60' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='160' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='104' x2='150' y2='96' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='154' cy='96' r='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><line x1='140' y1='82' x2='168' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='168' y1='82' x2='140' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sisilayidi lesiphambuka: i-eugenics yilapho imibono leyingoti iba ngemacebo esento sahulumende lokumelene nebantfu bangempela. Caphela kutsi i-eugenics beyingesiyo nkholelo yasemaphetselweni - beyifundziswa emanyuvesi laphambili futsi isekelwa bososayensi labahloniphekile, bosopolitiki nebaguculi kuwo onkhe emacembu etepolitiki. Loko kuhlonipheka ngiko kanye lokwayenta yaba yingoti kangaka. Bonisa ngaphambili kutsi tisilayidi letimbili letilandzelako tibonisa i-eugenics ifakwa emtsetfweni.

slides.title: I-Eugenics eMelika (United States)
slides.lead: IMelika beyilive lekucala kuphendvula i-eugenics ibe yinchubomgomo yahulumende lenkhulu.

blocks.text: Kusukela nga-1907, tifundza te-US tadlulisa imitsetfo **yekutsena ngenkani** bantfu lababekwatsi 'abakafaneli'. Elicaleni la-1927 *Buck v. Bell*, iNkantolo Lengetulu (Supreme Court) yavuma kutsenwa, iJaji Oliver Wendell Holmes yabhala umusho lodvumile ngebubi lotsi, 'Titukulwane letintsatfu tetiphukuphuku tanele.' Emashumi etinkhulungwane emaMelika atsenwa ngaphandle kwemvume, futsi umtsetfo we-1924 we-Immigration Act wasebentisa umcabango we-eugenics kukhipha emacembu 'langafuneki'.

items: Labahlaselwa ikakhulukati bekubophuyile, labakhubatekile nalabavela emiphakatsini lemincane.
I-eugenics ye-US beyixhaswe ngemali, ihleliwe futsi incontywa emhlabeni wonkhe.
Bososayensi beluhlanga baseJalimane bafundza imitsetfo yaseMelika ngekusondzelana njengesibonelo.

media.alt: Isando lesijaji lelele etulu kweliphepha leliphawulwe ngesitembu lesibovu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='48' y='70' width='90' height='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='98' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='112' width='44' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='116' cy='126' r='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='44' height='18' rx='4' fill='#5c1414' transform='rotate(35 172 49)'/><rect x='150' y='58' width='10' height='40' rx='3' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(35 155 78)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sifundvo lesitsatfwako kutsi indlela leya etentweni telunya temaNazi ayizange icale eJalimane. I-USA, intsandvo yelinyenti (democracy), yaba ngumsunguli wenchubomgomo ye-eugenics lecindzetelako, futsi bashayi bemtsetfo bemaNazi bacaphuna ngekukhululeka imitsetfo yaseMelika ngesikhatsi babhala leyabo. Phatsa ngekucophelela leligama laBuck v. Bell - lichaze njengeliciniso lemlandvo lelilihlazo, hhayi njengelivi lekuhlambalata lekufanele liphindzaphindzwe nje. [SME] Cinisekisa emanani ekutsenwa (lavame kucatjulwa njengengetulu kwema-60,000 kulo lonkhe likhulu-20 leminyaka) nekucaphuna 'kwemtsetfo wekucala' wase-Indiana wa-1907 ngekumelene nemtfombo we-SAHO ngaphambi kwekukhicita.

slides.title: Bukoloni nekubulawa kwesive samaHerero nemaNama (genocide)
slides.lead: E-German South West Africa (lamuhla yiNamibia), imibono yeluhlanga yakhipha loko labanyenti labakubita ngekubulawa kwesive sekucala (genocide) kwelikhulu-20 leminyaka.

blocks.text: Ngesikhatsi tive tema-**Herero** nema-**Nama** tivukela umbuso wemakoloni waseJalimane, iGeneral **Lothar von Trotha** yakhipha umyalo wekubhubhisa (1904). Labasinda baphocelelwa ehlane nobe emakamu ekuboshwa (concentration camps), lapho khona kwafa tinkhulungwane. Tingebhezi tetimphetse lababefile tatfunyelwa eJalimane kuze tisetjentiswe elucwaningeni 'lwesayensi yeluhlanga'.

items: Bochwepheshe bemlandvo balinganisa kutsi cishe ema-65,000 emaHerero nema-10,000 emaNama abulawa.
Intiyori yeluhlanga yaphendvula kubulawa kwebantfu labanyenti kwaba kususwa 'kwemvelo' kwesive 'lesiphansi'.
Yona leyo mibono yemakamu neluhlelo lwemazinga eluhlanga beyitawuphindze ivele eYurophu ngemashumi eminyaka ngemuva.

media.alt: Umkhawulo welihlane lolukhulu lonelilanga lelisezantsi, lukhumbuta lihlane laseNamib.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 104 q60 -22 120 0 t120 0 v56 H0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M0 132 q80 -14 240 4 v24 H0 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sisilayidi sisekela imibono lengabambeki entweni yelunya lebonakalako lenekuhlobana ngalokucondzile nesifundza saseNingizimu Afrika (iNamibia beyibuswa yiNingizimu Afrika incenye lenkhulu yelikhulu-20 leminyaka). Gcizelela lokuncanyana lokwesabekako kwetingebhezi letatfunyelwa elucwaningeni lweluhlanga - kubonisa sayensi yemanga nebudlova lobukhulu kondlana. Dvweba umugca locondzile wekuchubeka uye eNazi Germany ngaphandle kwekuhlanganisa letigameko letimbili tibe sinye. [SME] Kubekwa 'kwekubulawa kwesive sekucala kwelikhulu-20' nemanani alabashonile kusetjentiswa kabanti kepha kuyaphikiswa ngebubanti; cinisekisa ngekumelene ne-athikili ye-SAHO ye-Herero Revolt.

slides.title: 'Luhlanga lolubusako' (master race) lwemaNazi
slides.lead: EmaNazi akha umbuso wonkhe usekelwe kusayensi yemanga 'yeluhlanga lolubusako lwema-Aryan'.

blocks.text: Ngemuva kwa-1933, iNazi Germany yenta luhlelo lwemazinga eluhlanga lwaba sisekelo semtsetfo. Basungula luhlanga lolubusako lwema-**Aryan** (*Herrenvolk*) futsi bachaza emaJuda, emaRoma, bantfu labamnyama nalabanye njenge'titsa' letiphansi. **Imitsetfo yeNuremberg (1935)** yephuca emaJuda bunikati bebamalunga bavelive (citizenship) futsi yavimbela imishado emkhatsini wemaJuda nalamanye emaJalimane - iphendvula bandlululo besayensi yemanga bube luhlelo lwemtsetfo lwekukhipha bantfu.

items: Umtsetfo we-1933 wavumela kutsenwa ngenkani 'kwalabangakafaneli ngefuza', kufana ne-eugenics ye-US.
Iphrophaganda, tikolo nesayensi konkhe kwakufundzisa kuhlelwa ngemazinga eluhlanga njengeliciniso.
Kukhishwa kwakhula sinyatselo ngesinyatselo: kusukela ebunikatini bebamalunga bavelive, kuya empahleni, kuya ekuphileni ngekwako.

media.alt: Liphepha lelisemtsetfweni leliphawuliwe bese ludzatjulwa kabili, limelela bunikati bebamalunga bavelive lobususwe ngumtsetfo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='118' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='60' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='72' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M104 30 L112 60 L104 90 L112 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M118 30 L110 60 L118 90 L110 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bonisa bafundzi indlela lesihloko se-CAPS lesifuna bayicondze: imibono yeluhlanga iba 'yincenye lebalulekile yenchubomgomo yahulumende nemtsetfo'. Imitsetfo yeNuremberg ngiwo umbonelo locace kunayo yonkhe - umtsetfo lochaza kutsi ngubani lobalwa njengemuntfu logcwele. Khomba umugca locondzile losukela kusisilayidi se-eugenics se-US sangaphambili: umtsetfo wekutsena waseJalimane wa-1933 wentiwa incenye ngekulingisa imitsetfo yaseMelika. Gcizelela imvelo lekhulako yekushushiswa - akuzange kucale ngekubulala, kwacala ngemaphepha.

slides.title: I-Holocaust
slides.lead: Umbono weluhlanga wagcina ngekubulawa lokuhleliwe, lokwenteka ngesu lemboni kwetigidzi tebantfu.

blocks.text: Ngesikhatsi seMphi Yemhlaba Yesibili, umbuso wemaNazi wenta i-**Holocaust** - kubulawa lokwentiwe ngamabomu, lokuhleliwe, kwacishe kwaba **tigidzi letisitfupha temaJuda**, kanye nemaRoma, bantfu labakhubatekile, baphikisi betepolitiki nalabanye lababekwatsi 'abakafaneli kuphila'. Loku bekuligcino lelesabekako lelikhulu leminyaka lemcabango weluhlanga lowawuhlele bantfu bese wenta ngaloko kuhlela.

items: Bantfu labakhubatekile bebaphakatsi kwalabahlaselwa kucala, ngeluhlelo 'lwe-euthanasia' lwangaphambili.
Buholi bahulumende, sayensi nethekhnoloji konkhe kwasetjentiswa kubulala ngezinga lemboni.
I-Holocaust ime njengesecwayiso lesikhulu kunato tonkhe salapho imibono yeluhlanga ingaholela khona.

media.alt: Likhandlela linye lelikhanyako esizindzeni lesimnyama, luphawu lwenkhumbulo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#2b2b2b'/><rect x='88' y='72' width='24' height='60' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='8' height='16' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M100 22 q14 20 0 36 q-14 -16 0 -36 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M100 34 q7 10 0 20 q-7 -10 0 -20 Z' fill='#fff4d6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sisilayidi lesizweleka kunato tonkhe - siphatse ngesineketiso nangekunakekela. Gcina kugcile enanini lebantfu nasekukhumbuleni, hhayi kuncanyana lokubonakalako. Yenta iphuzu lekuhlaziya lekutsi i-Holocaust beyingesiyo buhlanya lobusheshako kepha kwakuligcino lelinemcondvo lemibono labafundzi labayilandzele lonkhe sifundvo: kuhlukanisa, luhlelo lwemazinga, kwephucwa buntfu, kukhishwa, bese kubhujiswa. Caphela sicondziso sekufundzisa se-SAHO nge-Holocaust bese uxhumanisa nemalungelo ebantfu lavela ngemuva (i-Universal Declaration of Human Rights ya-1948 neligama lelitsi 'genocide').

slides.title: Imibono yeluhlanga neNingizimu Afrika
slides.lead: Yona leyo mifula yemcabango weluhlanga yabumba kwehlukaniswa nebandlululo (apartheid) ekhaya.

blocks.text: INingizimu Afrika beyiyincenye yalendzaba yemhlaba wonkhe. Bohulumende bemakoloni nebemafikinsi basebentisa yona leyo mibono yesayensi yemanga kufakazela kuncoba, kwephucwa umhlaba nekwehlukaniswa. Ngemuva kwa-1948, **ibandlululo (apartheid)** lakha luhlelo lwemtsetfo lonkhe lusekelwe kuhlukaniseni ngeluhlanga - ikakhulukati **ku-Population Registration Act ya-1950**, leyahlela wonkhe umuntfu abe se'luhlangeni' lolusemtsetfweni.

items: Bochwepheshe bemlandvo bavame kucatsanisa imitsetfo yebandlululo yekucala nemtsetfo weluhlanga wemaNazi.
Kukona kokubili, umbuso, hhayi ibayoloji, wancuma kutsi ngubani lolenela kuluphi 'luhlanga'.
Kucondza sayensi yemanga yeluhlanga kusita kuchaza kutsi kungani ibandlululo lalingekho bulungiswa kuze kuyimpandze yalo.

media.alt: Incwadzi yesatiso (ID) leliphawulwe ngesigaba, ikhumbuta kuhlukaniswa ngeluhlanga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='45' y='24' width='90' height='112' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='56' y='38' width='34' height='40' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='73' cy='54' r='9' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 74 q13 -14 26 0 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='96' y='42' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='92' width='68' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='56' y='116' width='52' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fike ekutseni lesihloko sibaluleke ngani kubafundzi baseNingizimu Afrika: imibono lefundvwa lapha beyingesiyo nkinga yaseYurophu kuphela, yasetjentiswa kwakha kwehlukaniswa nebandlululo ekhaya. Dvweba kucatsaniswa ngekucophelela neNazi Germany (kokubili kwasebentisa kuhlukanisa kwembuso) kanti ucaphela kwehluka - ibandlululo beligcile ekusetjentisweni kabi lokulawulwako nekwehlukaniswa kunekubhubhisa. Loku kuxhumana nangaphambili netincenye tebandlululo teLibanga 11 ne-12.

slides.title: Kusukela ekuhlukaniseni kuya enhlekeleleni

blocks.alt: Umugca wesikhatsi wekutfutfuka kwemibono yeluhlanga kusukela nga-1735 kuya ku-1950.

events.label: Darwin ushicilela On the Origin of Species
Buck v. Bell yase-US ivumela kutsenwa ngenkani

slides.notes: Sebentisa umugca wesikhatsi kucinisa umbono njengeketane lesizatfu nemphumela: umbono (kuhlukanisa) uba luqinako ube sayensi yemanga (Social Darwinism, eugenics), lobhalwa emtsetfweni (US, Nazi Germany, Ningizimu Afrika) futsi wentiwa njengebudlova (kubulawa kwetive ngemakoloni, i-Holocaust). Cela bafundzi bakhombe kutsi tiphi tigameko 'letimibono', tiphi 'letimitsetfo' netiphi 'letibudlova' - ucinisa sakhiwo lesisisekelo sesihloko ngaphambi kwemibuzo yekubuketa.

slides.title: Loko lesikufundzile
slides.lead: Imibono inemandla: sayensi yemanga yeluhlanga, ngemuva kwekukholelwa neyabekwa emtsetfweni, yabita emashumi etigidzi tekuphila.

blocks.text: Kuwo wonkhe lesifundvo silandzele kutsi 'luhlanga' **lwasungulwa, hhayi kutfolakala**; kutsi sayensi yemanga (Social Darwinism ne-eugenics) yanika bandlululo simbonzelo lesihloniphekile; nekutsi, ngesikhatsi bohulumende bbabhala lemibono **emtsetfweni**, imiphumela yasukela ekutsenweni ngenkani kuya ekubulaweni kwesive ngemakoloni ne-Holocaust. Kufundza lomlandvo kusecwayiso ngeyingoti yemibono lehlukumeta bantfu - futsi kuvikela emalungelo ebantfu nesitfunti sebuntfu.

blocks.label: Q1
blocks.question: Chaza kutsi kungani bochwepheshe bemlandvo bachaza sayensi yeluhlanga yelikhulu-19 njenge'sayensi yemanga'. Bhekisela kutsi timphetfo tafikelwa njani.

blocks.label: Q2
blocks.question: 'Imibono yeluhlanga yaba yingoti ngempela kuphela ngesikhatsi bohulumende bayiphendvula yaba ngumtsetfo.' Uyavuma yini? Sebentisa okungenani tibonelo letimbili kulesifundvo kuze usekele imphendvulo yakho.

blocks.label: Q3
blocks.question: Catsanisa indlela luhlanga lolwasetjentiswa ngayo eNazi Germany nase-apartheid Ningizimu Afrika. Khomba kufana kunye nekwehluka kunye.

slides.notes: Phetsa ngekubuyela embikweni wekucala - luhlanga yintfo leyakhiwa ngumphakatsi lenemiphumela yangempela lecekelako - futsi ngekucinisekisa imphendvulo yemalungelo ebantfu leyalandzela nga-1945. Sebentisa lemibuzo lemitsatfu njengeluhlolo lolubhaliwe nobe ingxoxo lehleliwe; kwabiwa kwemamaki kulandzela tindlela te-CAPS tekubhala lokwendlaliwe nekucatsanisa imitfombo (Q2 ngumcatja/indzatjana; Q3 iyayilolonga likhono lekucatsanisa lesihloko lesilidzingako). Khumbuta bafundzi kutsi lesihloko sisekela tincenye tebandlululo netemalungelo ebantfu telandzelako.
